title: Feature: Fix project + agent registration fragmentation (ADR-065)

steps.description: Update hex agent connect CLI to send project_dir (CWD), generated session_id, and agent name in the POST body. Write session file client-side after successful response. Include projectId from response in session file.
steps.done_condition: hex agent connect writes ~/.hex/sessions/agent-{session_id}.json on the calling host with correct agentId and project

steps.description: Update POST /api/hex-agents/connect response to include projectId. Auto-register project via project_find/register_project when project_dir is provided but project doesn't exist in SpacetimeDB.
steps.done_condition: Connect response includes projectId; project auto-registered in SpacetimeDB project table

steps.description: Rewrite resolve_agent_id() in hex-cli/src/commands/inbox.rs with priority: (1) CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env → exact file lookup, (2) HEX_AGENT_ID env → direct use, (3) newest non-nexus session file. Filter out files where name starts with 'nexus-agent'.
steps.done_condition: resolve_agent_id returns correct ID when CLAUDE_SESSION_ID set, when HEX_AGENT_ID set, and when falling back to file scan (skipping nexus files)

steps.description: End-to-end test: hex agent connect on bazzite → session file written → hex inbox list resolves correct agent → notification received. Verify project appears in SpacetimeDB project table.
steps.done_condition: hex inbox list works on bazzite after hex agent connect; project visible in spacetime sql

mergeOrder: step-1 → step-3 (session file needed for resolve)

riskRegister.risk: Session file naming collision between hex agent connect and Claude Code session-start
riskRegister.mitigation: Use different prefixes: agent-session-{id} for Claude, agent-connect-{id} for CLI connect

riskRegister.risk: Project auto-registration creates duplicates across hosts

successCriteria: hex agent connect on bazzite writes session file readable by hex inbox list
hex inbox list on bazzite returns correct notifications for the connected agent
Project auto-registered in SpacetimeDB when agent connects from a new project
resolve_agent_id correctly prioritizes CLAUDE_SESSION_ID > HEX_AGENT_ID > file scan
